description_long: This is a modern residential house with a dark gray exterior, featuring a flat and gable roof combination. The property includes a spacious wooden deck with a swimming pool, sun loungers, and a large umbrella, creating a luxurious outdoor living area. The front yard is landscaped with hedges and a blossoming tree, and a paved driveway leads to an attached garage. Large windows and glass doors provide ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The house appears to have two stories, with a balcony or terrace on the upper level. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of indoor and outdoor living.
description: A modern two-story house with a dark gray facade, large windows, a wooden deck, swimming pool, and attached garage, surrounded by landscaped greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, attached garage, driveway, and landscaped yard with a blossoming tree.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and the depth of the house, with the wooden deck and pool visible at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the expansive wooden deck, swimming pool, sun loungers, and large glass doors leading into the house.
description_view_3: Side-rear view focusing on the pool area, outdoor furniture, and the connection between the deck and the house's interior.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple modern door, no porch, with a paved approach and minimal decorative elements.
